name: achords
description: Multi-agent orchestration protocol for software development

scripts.build: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:docs: cd web/docs/humans && npm ci --ignore-scripts && npx quartz build && sed -i 's|Achords|Achords|g' public/index.html public/404.html && mkdir -p ../../dist/docs/humans && cp -r public/* ../../dist/docs/humans/
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:docs
scripts.dev: cd web && npm install && npm run dev

author: achords-org
